name: PR fetcher routes summarization through the local-LLM execution surface when the local-LLM eligibility check passes
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/local-llm && printf '{"available":true,"model":"qwen2.5-coder-7b"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/local-llm/status.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --dry-run --upstream-stub fixtures/prs.jsonl 2>out.txt && grep -q 'summarizer=local-llm' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
